Test partial payment flow end-to-end in browser
Verify Docker production build succeeds after type fixes
human_actions_pending.context: Background Docker build failed before fixes were committed

decisions.decision: TDD mandatory for all BanChee development
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested Vitest + tests first

decisions.decision: Single Document Prisma model with documentType enum
decisions.rationale: Simpler than separate tables, supports chain linking via sourceDocumentId
User preference for speed + Thai tax law compliance
Sum receipts ≥ invoice total → mark paid

decisions.decision: Bank presets for KBank/SCB/BBL with flexible column mapping
decisions.rationale: Thai bank CSV formats vary — presets are best-guess, UI is safety net
@fast-csv/parse requires Node.js fs — cannot be in client components

next_action: Run /gsd:new-milestone to start v2.0 planning — e-Tax Invoice, multi-user, PND1, LINE notifications, or cloud SaaS
context_notes: Both v1.0 and v1.1 completed in a single marathon session. Total: 300 commits, 43,300+ LOC TypeScript, 8 phases, 30 plans. BanChee is a fully functional Thai SME accounting tool with AI receipt scanning, tax compliance, document workflow, and bank reconciliation. GitHub repo renamed to mingrath/banchee.
